　　身穿斩神世界，苏衍开局结识了林七夜，并觉醒了神祇系统。
　　身为代言人，苏衍获得了毁灭本源，杀戮毁灭神秘就能提升实力、解锁能力！
　　你是存于世间之物，就算是神，也得没！
　　苏衍：身后既是万万灯火，吾自一力当之，看好了，这一刀，将很帅！
　　毁灭之神前，
　　一切都是虚妄，掌握了毁灭的新神，将重塑秩序。苏衍手持三叉戟，直指众神，金色的血染透了苍穹。
　　古神教会？古神？！来，刃下走一回。
　　古神教会：啊啊啊……他…他一个人杀上来了……跑，快跑……
　　林七夜：你是神明代言？神墟！？
　　米迦勒：有意思……凡人…至高神！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ce1653783294af56b7d7fef0aea8c2dc","author":"爱吃鱼的猫爷","author_id":"","book_id":"7414735990960442392","book_name":"斩神：我，九神代理人，杀伐果断","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182038","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5252人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":857,"name":"斩神","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=857&name=斩神&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7415228706077016600","read_count":"5252","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"248946"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"124","tags":"男频衍生,二次元,无女主,开局,同人,斩神,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/eb194661466a4bd24f82c7e306ae7070~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779441773&x-signature=8e%2F0%2B1pcBz%2BgaTSZNTKGKxiPMPs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3732189103799063","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"37"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323172253852E8941A5C923C00261"}"},"relate_info_l
